title: Wehooper 915 MHz BPF Board
description: A tiny PCB filter with ipex input/output. Comes with a ipex jumper.
commentary: Varying performance, these are 2 of the best out of a set of 16 that I purchased in bulk. These are super useful for tight enclosures like a RAK Unify enclosure or a handheld node that needs some filtering(looking at you G2/Ikoka Stick). These perform fine even at 1w, we've had a few in service on 1w nodes for multiple months now with no degredation.
